Get in touch

Contact us

The fastest way to reach us is WhatsApp — we usually reply within a few hours, every day.

WhatsApp Chat now Phone +91 7976014592 Email art.fankar@gmail.com

Send an enquiry

Please fill your name, a valid phone number, and tick the consent box.

Your enquiry opens in WhatsApp, pre-filled — just press send. (Email delivery switches on automatically once the form key is added in Global Settings — see the editing guide.)

Our branches

  • Malviya Nagar

    1/36, Sant Kheteshwar Marg, Malviya Nagar, Jaipur

  • Tonk Road

    3 Janakpuri, 1st Imli Phatak, Tonk Road, Jaipur

    Full address coming soon — tap “Get directions” or WhatsApp us and we'll guide you to the studio.

    Branch page Directions

  • Nirman Nagar

    872 Gautam Marg, Rani Sati Nagar, Nirman Nagar, Jaipur

    Branch page Directions

Enquiry hours

Class hours vary by branch — see each branch page. Enquiries: 10 AM – 8 PM, all days.
